investigate.title: AI Investigator
investigate.placeholder: Ask a question about the consequences of war for children...

perspectives.title: Perspectives
perspectives.choose_desc: Six voices. The same war. Each perspective is based on documented facts – to foster understanding, not entertainment.

perspectives.footer: Based on documented facts · UNICEF · ICRC · SIPRI · UN
